# Exam Testing Skill

## Overview
This skill covers best practices for testing exam functionality in the ExamForge platform, including unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end testing strategies.

## Topics Covered
- Unit testing with Jest
- Integration testing for API endpoints
- End-to-end testing with Playwright
- Mock data and fixtures
- Test coverage analysis
- Continuous integration setup

## Learning Objectives
After completing this skill, you will be able to:
- Write effective unit tests for React components
- Test API endpoints and authentication flows
- Create reliable end-to-end tests for exam workflows
- Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions
- Maintain code quality standards

## Prerequisites
- Basic JavaScript knowledge
- Understanding of Node.js and npm
- Familiarity with React fundamentals

## Resources
- [Jest Documentation](https://jestjs.io/)
- [Playwright Testing](https://playwright.dev/)
- [Testing Library](https://testing-library.com/)

## Quick Start
See `scripts/setup.sh` to get started with the testing environment.

## Validation
Run `scripts/validate.py` to check your understanding and validate implementations.
